title: Reputation-Guided Protection Mechanism for Data Centers
description: A flowchart illustrating how a reputation system dynamically guides security decisions and resource allocation to protect a cloud data center.
relationships: Monitoring system feeds behavior data to Reputation Engine
Reputation Engine calculates a risk score for each asset
Policy Enforcer uses the reputation score to apply security measures (e.g., allow, isolate, deny, scrutinize)
The applied security measures directly protect the Data Center Assets from Threats
